# WHOIS(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  whois — query domain registration information

## SYNOPSIS
  whois <domain>

## DESCRIPTION
Returns registrant, admin contact, and expiry information for a domain.

## EXAMPLES
  whois nexuscorp.com
  whois chimera-control

## SEE ALSO
  dig, nslookup, curl
